title: rosa gallica proles rubra
intro: Rosa gallica proles rubra, also known as the Red Gallate, is a variety of the Rosa gallica plant, a species of rose native to southern Europe. It is used in herbal medicine due to its astringent, antiseptic, and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to soothe and calm irritated skin and mucous membranes. The health benefits of Rosa gallica proles rubra include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and support the immune system. The herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and salves, which can be used to treat a range of ailments, from skin irritations to respiratory issues.
